/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TN: RENE DIXON ARTEAGA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) &DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 01-11-22 (10TH)/X: THE 30TH LAST DAY IS 02-09-22, THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 02-25-22/OR/WS/SA2: 665 EDDY ST,SF, CA/SAORD4: 150 YARDS AWAY FROM 600 BLOCK OF EDDY ST, SF, CA/SAORD/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
